requirement_topic.en: Korean Marking, Importer Responsibility, and Market Surveillance
requirement_topic.zh: 韩文标识、进口商责任及市场监督
requirement_topic.zht: 韓文標識、進口商責任及市場監督

summary.en: Chinese domestic labels and manuals usually reference GB standards, Chinese importer or manufacturer data, and Chinese warning text. They do not satisfy Korean-language labeling or Korean importer-responsibility requirements unless localized and tied to the Korean certification records.
summary.zh: 中国国内标签和说明书通常引用 GB 标准、中国进口商或制造商信息及中文警示语。除非完成本地化并与韩国认证记录对应，否则不能满足韩文标签或韩国进口商责任要求。
summary.zht: 中國國內標籤和說明書通常引用 GB 標準、中國進口商或製造商資訊及中文警示語。除非完成本地化並與韓國認證記錄對應，否則不能滿足韓文標籤或韓國進口商責任要求。

standards_or_laws: Chinese product label and manual requirements

gap.en: Export files should include Korean labels, Korean manuals, KC certificate numbers, model-family mapping, importer identity, and rating-plate artwork. A technically compliant inverter can still be blocked or recalled if certification numbers, model names, or Korean warnings do not match the approved records.
gap.zh: 出口文件应包括韩文标签、韩文说明书、KC 证书编号、型号族映射、进口商身份及铭牌图稿。即使逆变器技术上合格，如证书编号、型号名称或韩文警告与获批记录不一致，仍可能被拦截或召回。
gap.zht: 出口文件應包括韓文標籤、韓文說明書、KC 證書編號、型號族映射、進口商身份及銘牌圖稿。即使逆變器技術上合格，如證書編號、型號名稱或韓文警告與獲批記錄不一致，仍可能被攔截或召回。

mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China domestic placement but not accepted as Korean labeling.
mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where KC safety or EMC conformity applies.

source.publisher: Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy (MOTIE), Republic of Korea

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Korean labeling and importer-record alignment should be checked before shipment, not after customs or KEPCO review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 韩文标签和进口商记录一致性应在出货前核查，而不是等到海关或 KEPCO 审查后再处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 韓文標籤和進口商記錄一致性應在出貨前核查，而不是等到海關或 KEPCO 審查後再處理。

summary.en: KC-regulated products must carry the required Korean certification information, KC mark, model identification, electrical ratings, manufacturer or importer information, warnings, and user instructions required by the applicable KC safety and EMC rules. The Korean importer is a key responsible party for placing imported electrical appliances on the Korean market and for maintaining certification, labeling, and recall/market-surveillance records.
summary.zh: 受 KC 管制的产品须标示适用 KC 安全和 EMC 规则要求的韩文认证信息、KC 标志、型号识别、电气额定值、制造商或进口商信息、警告及使用说明。韩国进口商是将进口电气用品投放韩国市场的关键责任主体，负责维持认证、标签及召回/市场监督记录。
summary.zht: 受 KC 管制的產品須標示適用 KC 安全和 EMC 規則要求的韓文認證資訊、KC 標誌、型號識別、電氣額定值、製造商或進口商資訊、警告及使用說明。韓國進口商是將進口電氣用品投放韓國市場的關鍵責任主體，負責維持認證、標籤及召回/市場監督記錄。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act
RRA/KC EMC labeling rules where applicable
